channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hegseth to Campaign for Massie's Opponent Ahead of Kentucky Primary
item.description: War Secretary Pete Hegseth will appear in a personal capacity at a rally for congressional candidate Ed Gallrein, who is challenging...

item.title: CBP Seizes 100 Million Lethal Doses of Fentanyl at Southwest Border
Trump's Taiwan 'Negotiating Chip' Remark Raises Concerns Over US-China Policy Shift
item.description: President Donald Trump suggests a $14 billion Taiwan weapons package could be used as leverage in China talks, prompting swift backlash from Taiwan...

item.title: House Panel to Question Guard Over Epstein's Jail Death
item.description: House Republicans intensify their investigation into the 2019 death of Jeffrey Epstein, with former federal prison guards set to be questioned...
